directions.style: Premium finance-editorial, dark market-digest cover system
directions.layout: Top: section label + date. Middle: one large headline. Lower third: compact data chips. Footer: source + brand.
directions.background: Near-black navy (#0B1220) with a faint single trend line, generous negative space, no candlestick spam
directions.typography: Tight geometric sans; oversized bold headline, light subhead, mono for numbers
directions.visual_elements: Delta chips (▲/▼ %), thin rule lines, one accent color per slide, small circular icon
directions.chart_style: Single minimal line or 3-4 bar mini-chart, no gridlines
directions.why_it_fits: Reads instantly on mobile, looks like a high-end market digest, lets numbers breathe

directions.layout: Left-aligned headline column + right data card; airy margins
directions.background: White / very light grey, thin teal accent rule
directions.typography: Editorial serif headline + sans body; strong hierarchy
directions.visual_elements: Boxed stat cards, one highlighted metric, subtle iconography
directions.chart_style: Flat horizontal bars or a single sparkline
directions.why_it_fits: Feels like a research note; great for company/sector data slides; very legible

directions.layout: Slide 1 dark hero; slides 2-3 light cards with consistent footer system
directions.background: Mixed: dark navy hero, light analytical interiors
directions.typography: Consistent sans family across both modes
directions.visual_elements: Shared chip + footer system, accent color carries across slides
directions.chart_style: Line on cover, bars on interior cards
directions.why_it_fits: Maximum visual variety while staying one cohesive system — avoids three near-identical slides

selection_rationale: 'Hybrid Cover+Cards' scored highest because it maximizes slide-to-slide variety while keeping one cohesive premium system — directly addressing the 'don't make three repetitive slides' requirement — and stays highly mobile-readable.
